zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Eames於1548年出生在英國多瑟特福丁頓時，他的父親John Thomas Eames Ainge23歲，母親Joan Fiske23歲。他於大約1568年與Millicent在英國英格蘭多瑟特福丁頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1577年住在英國英格蘭多瑟特福丁頓。他去世於1618年6月25日在英國多瑟特福丁頓享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Eames于1548年出生在英国多瑟特福丁頓时，他的父亲John Thomas Eames Ainge23岁，母亲Joan Fiske23岁。他于大约1568年与Millicent在英国英格兰多瑟特福丁頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1577年住在英国英格兰多瑟特福丁頓。他去世于1618年6月25日在英国多瑟特福丁頓享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eames
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English eme, eim ‘uncle’ (Old English ēam). Most of the modern variants of the surname have post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Eames was born in 1548, in Fordington, Dorset, England, his father, John Thomas Eames Ainge, was 23 and his mother, Joan Fiske, was 23. He married Millicent about 1568, in Fordington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Fordington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom in 1577. He died on 25 June 1618, in Fordington, Dorset, England, at the age of 70.

Il a épousé Millicent environ 1568, à Fordington, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Fordington, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1577. Il est décédé le 25 juin 1618, à Fordington, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

Er starb am 25. Juni 1618 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Fordington, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Eamesが1548年にイギリスドールセトフォーディントンで生まれた時，父John Thomas Eames Aingeは23歳，母Joan Fiskeは23歳であった。約1568年にイギリスイギリスドールセトフォーディントンでMillicentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1577年にはイギリスイギリスドールセトフォーディントンに住んでいた。彼は1618年6月25日にイギリスドールセトフォーディントンで70歳で死去した。

ko.St. George, Dorset, England: 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이 슈레w스버이 스트 조지
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Eames(이)가 1548년 영국 도르세트 포딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thomas Eames Ainge(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Fiske(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1568년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 포딩턴에서 Millicent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1577년도에 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 포딩턴에서 살았다. 그는 1618년 6월 25일 영국 도르세트 포딩턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Eames nasceu em 1548, em Fordington, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Thomas Eames Ainge, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joan Fiske, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Millicent aproximadamente 1568, em Fordington, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Fordington, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1577. Ele faleceu em 25 de junho de 1618, em Fordington, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.St. George, Dorset, England: шрюсбури ст джеордж, шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Eames родился в 1548 г. в местности фордингтон, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Thomas Eames Ainge было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Fiske, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Millicent около 1568 г. в местности фордингтон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности фордингтон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в 1577 году. Он умер 25 июня 1618 г. в местности фордингтон, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.
